# ui.components.layout { #app.ui.components.layout }

`ui.components.layout`

UI layout components for the BAM dashboard.

Provides reusable navigation controls, footer licensing blocks, and other
future layout components.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [footer](#app.ui.components.layout.footer) | Render the copyright disclosure and Creative Commons usage policy wrapper. |

### footer { #app.ui.components.layout.footer }

```python
ui.components.layout.footer()
```

Render the copyright disclosure and Creative Commons usage policy wrapper.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type         | Description                                                              |
|--------|--------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | shiny.ui.Tag | A bottom-anchored content div element styled with appropriate CSS rules. |
